specific_question: How many predictive maintenance alerts does Elexion Automotive expect to receive per month from digital twin monitoring across all its production lines in Q4, 2025?
answer: Internal Elexion Automotive system forecasts estimate that digital twin-enabled monitoring will generate 120 predictive maintenance alerts per month across all integrated production lines between October 1 and December 31, 2025.
dr_question: How can Elexion Automotive use real-time data from IoT sensors embedded in vehicles and manufacturing equipment, combined with digital engineering-enabled digital twins, to enhance predictive maintenance and minimize downtime in production lines by the end of 2025?
